title: Kroger's earnings top estimates but company offers cautious guidance for full year amid food-at-home disinflation
text: Kroger Co. KR, -0.64% posted better-than-expected third-quarter earnings early Thursday, but offered cautious guidance for the full year amid continued near-term economic pressures and food-at-home disinflation. The company had net income of $646 million, or 88 cents a share, for the quarter, up from $398 million, or 55 cents a share, in the year-earlier period.

title: Kroger Reports Third Quarter 2023 Results and Updates Guidance
text: Third Quarter Highlights  Identical Sales without fuel decreased 0.6%; underlying Identical Sales without fuel increased 1.0%( 1) Operating Profit of $912 million; EPS of $0.88 Adjusted FIFO Operating Profit of $1,022 million; Adjusted EPS of $0.95 Achieved strong Adjusted Free Cash Flow leading to a net total debt to adjusted EBITDA ratio of 1.40, compared to a target range of 2.3 to 2.5 Executed its go-to-market strategy to deliver value for customers Grew digital sales 11% Increased total and loyal customer households CINCINNATI , Nov. 30, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- The Kroger Co. (NYSE: KR) today reported its third quarter 2023 results and updated investors on how Leading with Fresh and Accelerating with Digital continues to position Kroger for long-term sustainable growth.
